title: CTOV - Gazebo compat
description: Compatibility datapack between ChoiceTheorem's overhauled village and gazebos mod
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between CTOV and Gazebos. You will find some gazebos in village. 1.19+ datapack is for both Forge and Fabric.

**Gazebos mod**

Gazebos mod can be obtained from [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/gazebos)

**CTOV mod**

CTOV mod can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village)
